title: [ESI Runtime] Add statically typed port wrappers
body:
Add `TypedPorts.h` — a header-only library providing strongly-typed, non-owning wrappers around the ESI runtime's untyped port classes. Purely additive with no changes to existing port classes.

## New APIs

**`TypedWritePort<T>` / `TypedReadPort<T>`**
- Verify type compatibility at `connect()` time via `if constexpr` dispatch over `_ESI_ID` structs, void, bool, signed/unsigned integers
- Typed `write(const T&)` / `read() → T` APIs
- Explicit void specializations
- Unwraps `TypeAliasType` before comparison

**`TypedFunction<ArgT, ResultT>`**
- Non-owning wrapper around `FuncService::Function`
- Implicitly constructible from `Function*` (`getAs<>` return):
  ```cpp
  TypedFunction<ArgStruct, ResultStruct> func = port.getAs<Function>();
  func.connect();
  ResultStruct res = func.call(arg).get();
  ```
- Four specializations for void/non-void arg/result combinations

## Tests
- **15 GTest unit tests** covering all verification paths, connect-time rejection, write round-trip, TypedFunction call round-trip
- **Integration test** (`loopback_typed.cpp`) — typed variant of the loopback cosim test, wired into pytest
